tEn: VICReg: Variance-Invariance-Covariance Regularization for Self-Supervised Learning
tZh: VICReg：用于自监督学习的方差-不变性-协方差正则化
sEn: VICReg explicitly avoids collapse in self-supervised learning by regularizing embedding variance and covariance.
sZh: VICReg通过正则化嵌入的方差和协方差，明确避免了自监督学习中的崩溃问题。
absEn: Recent self-supervised methods for image representation learning are based on maximizing the agreement between embedding vectors from different views of the same image. A trivial solution is obtained when the encoder outputs constant vectors. This collapse problem is often avoided through implicit biases in the learning architecture, that often lack a clear justification or interpretation. In this paper, we introduce VICReg (Variance-Invariance-Covariance Regularization), a method that explicitly avoids the collapse problem with a simple regularization term on the variance of the embeddings along each dimension individually. VICReg combines the variance term with a decorrelation mechanism based on redundancy reduction and covariance regularization, and achieves results on par with the state of the art on several downstream tasks. In addition, we show that incorporating our new variance term into other methods helps stabilize the training and leads to performance improvements.
absZh: 最近的自监督图像表示学习方法基于最大化同一图像不同视角的嵌入向量之间的一致性。当编码器输出恒定向量时，会出现平凡解。这种崩溃问题通常通过学习架构中的隐式偏差来避免，但这些偏差往往缺乏明确的理由或解释。在本文中，我们引入了VICReg（方差-不变性-协方差正则化），该方法通过在每个维度上对嵌入的方差进行简单的正则化，明确避免了崩溃问题。VICReg将方差项与基于冗余减少和协方差正则化的去相关机制相结合，在多个下游任务上取得了与最先进方法相当的结果。此外，我们表明将新的方差项纳入其他方法有助于稳定训练并带来性能提升。

contrib.en: Introduces VICReg, a self-supervised method with variance, invariance, and covariance regularization to explicitly prevent collapse.
contrib.zh: 提出VICReg，一种通过方差、不变性和协方差正则化显式防止坍塌的自监督方法。

contrib.en: Variance term maintains embedding variance above a threshold, preventing norm collapse.
contrib.zh: 方差项将嵌入方差维持在阈值以上，防止范数坍塌。

contrib.en: Covariance term decorrelates embedding dimensions, maximizing information content.
contrib.zh: 协方差项去相关嵌入维度，最大化信息含量。

contrib.en: VICReg does not require weight sharing, batch normalization, or memory banks, enabling multi-modal applications.
contrib.zh: VICReg无需权重共享、批归一化或记忆库，支持多模态应用。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results on ImageNet linear evaluation and transfer tasks.
contrib.zh: 在ImageNet线性评估和迁移任务上达到最先进水平。

contrib.en: Variance regularization stabilizes training and improves performance when added to other methods.
contrib.zh: 方差正则化加入其他方法时可稳定训练并提升性能。

limits.en: Performance on detection tasks slightly behind top methods like SwAV and BYOL.
limits.zh: 在检测任务上略逊于SwAV和BYOL等顶尖方法。

limits.en: Requires careful tuning of hyperparameters λ and μ for optimal performance.
limits.zh: 需要仔细调优超参数λ和μ以获得最佳性能。

limits.en: Covariance regularization may hinder optimization when combined with stop-gradient.
limits.zh: 协方差正则化与停止梯度结合时可能阻碍优化。

limits.en: VICReg's expander architecture adds computational overhead during pretraining.
limits.zh: VICReg的扩展器架构在预训练期间增加了计算开销。

limits.en: Limited evaluation on multi-modal tasks beyond image-text retrieval.
limits.zh: 除图像-文本检索外，多模态任务评估有限。

items.en: Recent self-supervised methods for image representation learning maximize the agreement between embedding vectors produced by encoders fed with different views of the same image. The main challenge is to prevent a collapse in which the encoders produce constant or non-informative vectors. We introduce VICReg (Variance-Invariance-Covariance Regularization), a method that explicitly avoids the collapse problem with two regularizations terms applied to both embeddings separately: (1) a term that maintains the variance of each embedding dimension above a threshold, (2) a term that decorrelates each pair of variables. Unlike most other approaches to the same problem, VICReg does not require techniques such as: weight sharing between the branches, batch normalization, feature-wise normalization, output quantization, stop gradient, memory banks, etc., and achieves results on par with the state of the art on several downstream tasks. In addition, we show that our variance regularization term stabilizes the training of other methods and leads to performance improvements.
items.zh: 最近，用于图像表示学习的自监督方法最大化由编码器产生的嵌入向量之间的一致性，这些编码器接收同一图像的不同视图。主要挑战是防止编码器产生常数或非信息性向量的坍缩。我们引入了VICReg（方差-不变性-协方差正则化），这是一种通过两个正则化项分别应用于两个嵌入来明确避免坍缩问题的方法：（1）一个保持每个嵌入维度方差高于阈值的项，（2）一个去相关每对变量的项。与大多数其他解决同一问题的方法不同，VICReg不需要诸如：分支之间的权重共享、批归一化、特征归一化、输出量化、梯度停止、记忆库等技术，并在多个下游任务上取得了与最先进方法相当的结果。此外，我们展示了我们的方差正则化项稳定了其他方法的训练，并带来了性能提升。

items.en: Self-supervised representation learning has made significant progress over the last years, almost reaching the performance of supervised baselines on many downstream tasks Bachman et al. (2019); Misra & Maaten (2020); He et al. (2020); Tian et al. (2020); Caron et al. (2020); Grill et al. (2020); Chen & He (2020); Gidaris et al. (2021); Zbontar et al. (2021). Several recent approaches rely on a joint embedding architecture in which two networks are trained to produce similar embeddings for different views of the same image. A popular instance is the Siamese network architecture Bromley et al. (1994), where the two networks share the same weights. The main challenge with joint embedding architectures is to prevent a collapse in which the two branches ignore the inputs and produce identical and constant output vectors. There are two main approaches to preventing collapse: contrastive methods and information maximization methods. Contrastive Bromley et al. (1994); Chopra et al. (2005); He et al. (2020); Hjelm et al. (2019); Chen et al. (2020a) methods tend to be costly, require large batch sizes or memory banks, and use a loss that explicitly pushes the embeddings of dissimilar images away from each other. They often require a mining procedure to search for offending dissimilar samples from a memory bank He et al. (2020) or from the current batch Chen et al. (2020a). Quantization-based approaches Caron et al. (2020; 2018) force the embeddings of different samples to belong to different clusters on the unit sphere. Collapse is prevented by ensuring that the assignment of samples to clusters is as uniform as possible. A similarity term encourages the cluster assignment score vectors from the two branches to be similar. More recently, a few methods have appeared that do not rely on contrastive samples or vector quantization, yet produce high-quality representations, for example BYOL Grill et al. (2020) and SimSiam Chen & He (2020). They exploit several tricks: batch-wise or feature-wise normalization, a "momentum encoder" in which the parameter vector of one branch is a low-pass-filtered version of the parameter vector of the other branch Grill et al. (2020); Richemond et al. (2020), or a stop-gradient operation in one of the branches Chen & He (2020). The dynamics of learning in these methods, and how they avoid collapse, is not fully understood, although theoretical and empirical studies point to the crucial importance of batch-wise or feature-wise normalization Richemond et al. (2020); Tian et al. (2021). Finally, an alternative class of collapse prevention methods relies on maximizing the information content of the embedding Zbontar et al. (2021); Ermolov et al. (2021). These methods prevent informational collapse by decorrelating every pair of variables of the embedding vectors. This indirectly maximizes the information content of the embedding vectors. The Barlow Twins method drives the normalized cross-correlation matrix of the two embeddings towards the identity Zbontar et al. (2021), while the Whitening-MSE method whitens and spreads out the embedding vectors on the unit sphere Ermolov et al. (2021).
items.zh: 自监督表示学习在过去几年取得了显著进展，在许多下游任务上几乎达到了监督基线的性能Bachman等人（2019）；Misra & Maaten（2020）；He等人（2020）；Tian等人（2020）；Caron等人（2020）；Grill等人（2020）；Chen & He（2020）；Gidaris等人（2021）；Zbontar等人（2021）。最近的几种方法依赖于联合嵌入架构，其中两个网络被训练为对同一图像的不同视图产生相似的嵌入。一个流行的实例是孪生网络架构Bromley等人（1994），其中两个网络共享相同的权重。联合嵌入架构的主要挑战是防止两个分支忽略输入并产生相同且恒定的输出向量的坍缩。有两种主要方法可以防止坍缩：对比方法和信息最大化方法。对比方法Bromley等人（1994）；Chopra等人（2005）；He等人（2020）；Hjelm等人（2019）；Chen等人（2020a）通常成本高昂，需要大批量大小或记忆库，并使用显式将不同图像的嵌入推开的损失函数。它们通常需要挖掘过程，从记忆库He等人（2020）或当前批次Chen等人（2020a）中搜索有问题的不同样本。基于量化的方法Caron等人（2020；2018）强制不同样本的嵌入属于单位球面上的不同聚类。通过确保样本到聚类的分配尽可能均匀来防止坍缩。一个相似性项鼓励两个分支的聚类分配得分向量相似。最近，出现了一些不依赖于对比样本或向量量化的方法，但仍能产生高质量表示，例如BYOL Grill等人（2020）和SimSiam Chen & He（2020）。它们利用了几种技巧：批归一化或特征归一化、“动量编码器”（其中一个分支的参数向量是另一个分支参数向量的低通滤波版本）Grill等人（2020）；Richemond等人（2020），或一个分支中的停止梯度操作Chen & He（2020）。这些方法的学习动态以及它们如何避免坍缩尚未完全理解，尽管理论和实证研究指出了批归一化或特征归一化的关键重要性Richemond等人（2020）；Tian等人（2021）。最后，另一类防止坍缩的方法依赖于最大化嵌入的信息内容Zbontar等人（2021）；Ermolov等人（2021）。这些方法通过去相关嵌入向量的每对变量来防止信息坍缩。这间接最大化嵌入向量的信息内容。Barlow Twins方法将两个嵌入的归一化互相关矩阵推向单位矩阵Zbontar等人（2021），而Whitening-MSE方法将嵌入向量白化并分散在单位球面上Ermolov等人（2021）。

items.en: We introduce VICReg (Variance-Invariance-Covariance Regularization), a self-supervised method for training joint embedding architectures based on the principle of preserving the information content of the embeddings. The basic idea is to use a loss function with three terms:
items.zh: 我们引入了VICReg（方差-不变性-协方差正则化），这是一种基于保留嵌入信息内容原理训练联合嵌入架构的自监督方法。基本思想是使用包含三个项的损失函数：

items.en: Invariance: the mean square distance between the embedding vectors.
items.zh: 不变性：嵌入向量之间的均方距离。

items.en: Variance: a hinge loss to maintain the standard deviation (over a batch) of each variable of the embedding above a given threshold. This term forces the embedding vectors of samples within a batch to be different.
items.zh: 方差：一个铰链损失，用于保持嵌入的每个变量（在一个批次上）的标准差高于给定阈值。该项强制批次内样本的嵌入向量不同。

items.en: Covariance: a term that attracts the covariances (over a batch) between every pair of (centered) embedding variables towards zero. This term decorrelates the variables of each embedding and prevents an informational collapse in which the variables would vary together or be highly correlated.
items.zh: 协方差：一个项，将每对（中心化）嵌入变量之间的协方差（在一个批次上）吸引到零。该项去相关每个嵌入的变量，并防止变量一起变化或高度相关的信息坍缩。

items.en: Variance and Covariance terms are applied to both branches of the architecture separately, thereby preserving the information content of each embedding at a certain level and preventing informational collapse independently for the two branches. The main contribution of this paper is the Variance preservation term, which explicitly prevents a collapse due to a shrinkage of the embedding vectors towards zero. The Covariance criterion is borrowed from the Barlow Twins method and prevents informational collapse due to redundancy between the embedding variables Zbontar et al. (2021). VICReg is more generally applicable than most of the aforementioned methods because of fewer constraints on the architecture. In particular, VICReg:
items.zh: 方差和协方差项分别应用于架构的两个分支，从而将每个嵌入的信息内容保持在一定水平，并独立防止两个分支的信息坍缩。本文的主要贡献是方差保持项，它明确防止由于嵌入向量向零收缩而导致的坍缩。协方差准则借鉴自Barlow Twins方法，并防止由于嵌入变量之间的冗余而导致的信息坍缩Zbontar等人（2021）。VICReg比大多数前述方法更通用，因为对架构的限制更少。特别是，VICReg：

items.en: does not require that the weights of the two branches be shared, not that the architectures be identical, nor that the inputs be of the same nature;
items.zh: 不需要两个分支的权重共享，也不需要架构相同，更不需要输入具有相同性质；

items.en: does not require a memory bank, nor contrastive samples, nor a large batch size;
items.zh: 不需要记忆库、对比样本或大批量大小；

items.en: does not require batch-wise nor feature-wise normalization; and
items.zh: 不需要批归一化或特征归一化；以及

items.en: does not require vector quantization nor a predictor module.
items.zh: 不需要向量量化或预测器模块。

items.en: Other methods require asymmetric stop gradient operations, as in SimSiam Chen & He (2020), weight sharing between the two branches as in classical Siamese nets, or weight sharing through exponential moving average dampening with stop gradient in one branch, as in BYOL and MoCo He et al. (2020); Grill et al. (2020); Chen et al. (2020c), large batches of contrastive samples, as in SimCLR Chen et al. (2020a), or batch-wise and/or feature-wise normalization Caron et al. (2020); Grill et al. (2020); Chen & He (2020); Zbontar et al. (2021); Ermolov et al. (2021). One of the most interesting feature of VICReg is the fact that the two branches are not required to share the same parameters, architecture, or input modality. This opens the door to the use of non-contrastive self-supervised joint-embedding for multi-modal signals, such as video and audio. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach by evaluating the representations learned with VICReg on several downstream image recognition tasks including linear head and semi-supervised evaluation protocols for image classification on ImageNet Deng et al. (2009), and other classification, detection, instance segmentation, and retrieval tasks. Furthermore, we show that incorporating variance preservation into other self-supervised joint-embedding methods yields better training stability and performance improvement on downstream tasks. More generally, we show that VICReg is an explicit and effective, yet simple method for preventing collapse in self-supervised joint-embedding learning.
items.zh: 其他方法需要不对称的停止梯度操作，如SimSiam Chen & He（2020），两个分支之间的权重共享，如经典孪生网络，或通过指数移动平均阻尼与一个分支中的停止梯度共享权重，如BYOL和MoCo He等人（2020）；Grill等人（2020）；Chen等人（2020c），大批量的对比样本，如SimCLR Chen等人（2020a），或批归一化和/或特征归一化Caron等人（2020）；Grill等人（2020）；Chen & He（2020）；Zbontar等人（2021）；Ermolov等人（2021）。VICReg最有趣的特征之一是，两个分支不需要共享相同的参数、架构或输入模态。这为将非对比自监督联合嵌入用于多模态信号（如视频和音频）打开了大门。我们通过评估使用VICReg学习到的表示在多个下游图像识别任务上的有效性来证明所提出方法的有效性，包括在ImageNet Deng等人（2009）上的线性头和半监督评估协议用于图像分类，以及其他分类、检测、实例分割和检索任务。此外，我们展示了将方差保持纳入其他自监督联合嵌入方法可以带来更好的训练稳定性和下游任务的性能提升。更一般地，我们展示了VICReg是一种显式、有效且简单的方法，用于防止自监督联合嵌入学习中的坍缩。

items.en: Contrastive learning. In contrastive SSL methods applied to joint embedding architectures, the output embeddings for a sample and its distorted version are brought close to each other, while other samples and their distortions are pushed away. The method is most often applied to Siamese architectures in which the two branches have identical architectures and share weights Misra & Maaten (2020); He et al. (2020); Bromley et al. (1994); Hjelm et al. (2019); Chen et al. (2020a; c); Hadsell et al. (2006); Ye et al. (2019); Wu et al. (2018); van den Oord et al. (2018); Chen et al. (2020b). Many authors use the InfoNCE loss van den Oord et al. (2018) in which the repulsive force is larger for contrastive samples that are closer to the reference. While these methods yield good performance, they require large amounts of contrastive pairs in order to work well. These contrastive pairs can be sampled from a memory bank as in MoCo He et al. (2020), or given by the current batch of data as in SimCLR Chen et al. (2020a), with a significant memory footprint. This downside of contrastive methods motivates a search for alternatives.
items.zh: 对比学习。在应用于联合嵌入架构的对比SSL方法中，一个样本及其扭曲版本的输出嵌入被拉近，而其他样本及其扭曲版本被推开。该方法最常应用于孪生架构，其中两个分支具有相同的架构并共享权重Misra & Maaten（2020）；He等人（2020）；Bromley等人（1994）；Hjelm等人（2019）；Chen等人（2020a；c）；Hadsell等人（2006）；Ye等人（2019）；Wu等人（2018）；van den Oord等人（2018）；Chen等人（2020b）。许多作者使用InfoNCE损失van den Oord等人（2018），其中对于更接近参考的对比样本，排斥力更大。虽然这些方法取得了良好的性能，但它们需要大量的对比对才能工作良好。这些对比对可以从记忆库中采样，如MoCo He等人（2020），或由当前批次数据提供，如SimCLR Chen等人（2020a），具有显著的内存占用。对比方法的这一缺点促使人们寻找替代方案。

items.en: Clustering methods. Instead of viewing each sample as its own class, clustering-based methods group them into clusters based on some similarity measure Caron et al. (2020; 2018); Bautista et al. (2016); Yang et al. (2016); Xie et al. (2016); Huang et al. (2019); Zhuang et al. (2019); Caron et al. (2019); Asano et al. (2020); Yan et al. (2020). DeepCluster Caron et al. (2018) uses k𝑘k-means assignments of representations from previous iterations as pseudo-labels for the new representations, which requires an expensive clustering phase done asynchronously, and makes the method hard to scale up. SwAV Caron et al. (2020) mitigates this issue by learning the clusters online while maintaining a balanced partition of the assignments through the Sinkhorn-Knopp transform Cuturi (2013). These clustering approaches can be viewed as contrastive learning at the level of clusters which still requires a lot of negative comparisons to work well.
items.zh: 聚类方法。聚类方法不是将每个样本视为自己的类别，而是基于某种相似性度量将它们分组到聚类中Caron等人（2020；2018）；Bautista等人（2016）；Yang等人（2016）；Xie等人（2016）；Huang等人（2019）；Zhuang等人（2019）；Caron等人（2019）；Asano等人（2020）；Yan等人（2020）。DeepCluster Caron等人（2018）使用来自先前迭代的表示的k均值分配作为新表示的伪标签，这需要昂贵的异步聚类阶段，并使方法难以扩展。SwAV Caron等人（2020）通过在线学习聚类同时通过Sinkhorn-Knopp变换Cuturi（2013）保持分配的平衡分区来缓解这个问题。这些聚类方法可以视为聚类级别的对比学习，仍然需要大量负比较才能工作良好。

items.en: Distillation methods. Recent proposals such as BYOL, SimSiam, OBoW and variants Grill et al. (2020); Chen & He (2020); Gidaris et al. (2021); Richemond et al. (2020); Gidaris et al. (2020) have shown that collapse can be avoided by using architectural tricks inspired by knowledge distillation Hinton et al. (2015). These methods train a student network to predict the representations of a teacher network, for which the weights are a running average of the student network’s weights Grill et al. (2020), or are shared with the student network, but no gradient is back-propagated through the teacher Chen & He (2020). These methods are effective, but there is no clear understanding of why and how they avoid collapse. Alternatively, the images can be represented as bags of word over a dictionary of visual features, which effectively prevents collapse. In OBoW Gidaris et al. (2020) and Gidaris et al. (2021) the dictionary is obtained by off-line or on-line clustering. By contrast, our method explicitly prevents collapse in the two branches independently, which removes the requirement for shared weights and identical architecture, opening the door to the application of joint-embedding SSL to multi-modal signals.
items.zh: 蒸馏方法。最近的提议如BYOL、SimSiam、OBoW及其变体Grill等人（2020）；Chen & He（2020）；Gidaris等人（2021）；Richemond等人（2020）；Gidaris等人（2020）表明，通过使用受知识蒸馏启发的架构技巧可以避免坍缩Hinton等人（2015）。这些方法训练一个学生网络来预测教师网络的表示，其中教师网络的权重是学生网络权重的运行平均值Grill等人（2020），或与学生网络共享，但梯度不通过教师网络反向传播Chen & He（2020）。这些方法是有效的，但对于它们为何以及如何避免坍缩没有明确的理解。或者，图像可以表示为视觉特征字典上的词袋，这有效地防止了坍缩。在OBoW Gidaris等人（2020）和Gidaris等人（2021）中，字典通过离线或在线聚类获得。相比之下，我们的方法明确防止两个分支独立坍缩，这消除了共享权重和相同架构的要求，为将联合嵌入SSL应用于多模态信号打开了大门。

items.en: Information maximization methods. A principle to prevent collapse is to maximize the information content of the embeddings. Two such methods were recently proposed: W-MSE Ermolov et al. (2021) and Barlow Twins Zbontar et al. (2021). In W-MSE, an extra module transforms the embeddings into the eigenspace of their covariance matrix (whitening or Karhunen-Loève transform), and forces the vectors thereby obtained to be uniformly distributed on the unit sphere. In Barlow Twins, a loss term attempts to make the normalized cross-correlation matrix of the embedding vectors from the two branches to be close to the identity. Both methods attempt to produce embedding variables that are decorrelated from each other, thus preventing an informational collapse in which the variables carry redundant information. Because all variables are normalized over a batch, there is no incentive for them to shrink nor expand. This seems to sufficient to prevent collapse. Our method borrows the decorrelation mechanism of Barlow Twins. But it includes an explicit variance-preservation term for each variable of the two embeddings and thus does not require any normalization.
items.zh: 信息最大化方法。防止坍缩的一个原则是最大化嵌入的信息内容。最近提出了两种这样的方法：W-MSE Ermolov等人（2021）和Barlow Twins Zbontar等人（2021）。在W-MSE中，一个额外的模块将嵌入转换到其协方差矩阵的特征空间（白化或Karhunen-Loève变换），并强制由此获得的向量均匀分布在单位球面上。在Barlow Twins中，一个损失项试图使来自两个分支的嵌入向量的归一化互相关矩阵接近单位矩阵。这两种方法都试图产生彼此去相关的嵌入变量，从而防止变量携带冗余信息的信息坍缩。由于所有变量都在一个批次上归一化，没有激励它们收缩或扩张。这似乎足以防止坍缩。我们的方法借鉴了Barlow Twins的去相关机制。但它包含一个显式的方差保持项，用于两个嵌入的每个变量，因此不需要任何归一化。

items.en: VICReg follows recent trends in self-supervised learning Caron et al. (2020); Grill et al. (2020); Chen & He (2020); Zbontar et al. (2021); Chen et al. (2020a) and is based on a joint embedding architecture. Contrary to many previous approaches, our architecture may be completely symmetric or completely asymmetric with no shared structure or parameters between the two branches. In most of our experiments, we use a Siamese net architecture in which the two branches are identical and share weights. Each branch consists of an encoder fθsubscript𝑓𝜃f_{\theta} that outputs the representations (used for downstream tasks), followed by an expander hϕsubscriptℎitalic-ϕh_{\phi} that maps the representations into an embedding space where the loss function will be computed. The role of the expander is twofold: (1) eliminate the information by which the two representations differ, (2) expand the dimension in a non-linear fashion so that decorrelating the embedding variables will reduce the dependencies (not just the correlations) between the variables of the representation vector. The loss function uses a term s𝑠s that learns invariance to data transformations and is regularized with a variance term v𝑣v that prevents norm collapse and a covariance term c𝑐c that prevents informational collapse by decorrelating the different dimensions of the vectors. After pretraining, the expander is discarded and the representations of the encoder are used for downstream tasks.
items.zh: VICReg遵循自监督学习的最新趋势Caron等人（2020）；Grill等人（2020）；Chen & He（2020）；Zbontar等人（2021）；Chen等人（2020a），并基于联合嵌入架构。与许多先前方法相反，我们的架构可以是完全对称的或完全不对称的，两个分支之间没有共享结构或参数。在我们的大多数实验中，我们使用孪生网络架构，其中两个分支相同并共享权重。每个分支由一个编码器fθ组成，输出表示（用于下游任务），后跟一个扩展器hϕ，将表示映射到将计算损失函数的嵌入空间。扩展器的作用有两个：（1）消除两个表示不同的信息，（2）以非线性方式扩展维度，以便去相关嵌入变量将减少表示向量变量之间的依赖关系（不仅仅是相关性）。损失函数使用一个项s来学习对数据变换的不变性，并通过方差项v（防止范数坍缩）和协方差项c（通过去相关向量的不同维度防止信息坍缩）进行正则化。预训练后，丢弃扩展器，编码器的表示用于下游任务。

items.en: Given an image i𝑖i sampled from a dataset 𝒟𝒟\mathcal{D}, two transformations t𝑡t and t′superscript𝑡′t^{\prime} are sampled from a distribution 𝒯𝒯\mathcal{T} to produce two different views x=t​(i)𝑥𝑡𝑖x=t(i) and x′=t′​(i)superscript𝑥′superscript𝑡′𝑖x^{\prime}=t^{\prime}(i) of i𝑖i. These transformations are random crops of the image, followed by color distortions. The distribution 𝒯𝒯\mathcal{T} is described in Appendix C. The views x𝑥x and x′superscript𝑥′x^{\prime} are first encoded by fθsubscript𝑓𝜃f_{\theta} into their representations y=fθ​(x)𝑦subscript𝑓𝜃𝑥y=f_{\theta}(x) and y′=fθ​(x′)superscript𝑦′subscript𝑓𝜃superscript𝑥′y^{\prime}=f_{\theta}(x^{\prime}), which are then mapped by the expander hϕsubscriptℎitalic-ϕh_{\phi} onto the embeddings z=hϕ​(y)𝑧subscriptℎitalic-ϕ𝑦z=h_{\phi}(y) and z′=hϕ​(y′)superscript𝑧′subscriptℎitalic-ϕsuperscript𝑦′z^{\prime}=h_{\phi}(y^{\prime}). The loss is computed at the embedding level on z𝑧z and z′superscript𝑧′z^{\prime}.
items.zh: 给定从数据集D中采样的图像i，从分布T中采样两个变换t和t'，以产生i的两个不同视图x=t(i)和x'=t'(i)。这些变换是图像的随机裁剪，随后是颜色失真。分布T在附录C中描述。视图x和x'首先由fθ编码为它们的表示y=fθ(x)和y'=fθ(x')，然后由扩展器hϕ映射到嵌入z=hϕ(y)和z'=hϕ(y')。损失在嵌入级别上对z和z'计算。

items.en: We describe here the variance, invariance and covariance terms that compose our loss function. The images are processed in batches, and we denote Z=[z1,…,zn]𝑍subscript𝑧1…subscript𝑧𝑛Z=[z_{1},\dots,z_{n}] and Z′=[z1′,…,zn′]superscript𝑍′superscriptsubscript𝑧1′…superscriptsubscript𝑧𝑛′Z^{\prime}=[z_{1}^{\prime},\dots,z_{n}^{\prime}] the two batches composed of n𝑛n vectors of dimension d𝑑d, of embeddings coming out of the two branches of the siamese architecture. We denote by zjsuperscript𝑧𝑗z^{j} the vector composed of each value at dimension j𝑗j in all vectors in Z𝑍Z. We define the variance regularization term v𝑣v as a hinge function on the standard deviation of the embeddings along the batch dimension:
items.zh: 我们在这里描述构成我们损失函数的方差、不变性和协方差项。图像以批次处理，我们记Z=[z1,...,zn]和Z'=[z1',...,zn']为两个批次，由来自孪生架构两个分支的n个d维嵌入向量组成。我们记z^j为Z中所有向量在维度j上的每个值组成的向量。我们将方差正则化项v定义为嵌入沿批次维度的标准差上的铰链函数：

items.en: where S𝑆S is the regularized standard deviation defined by:
items.zh: 其中 S 是由下式定义的正则化标准差：

items.en: γ𝛾\gamma is a constant target value for the standard deviation, fixed to 111 in our experiments, ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon is a small scalar preventing numerical instabilities. This criterion encourages the variance inside the current batch to be equal to γ𝛾\gamma along each dimension, preventing collapse with all the inputs mapped on the same vector. Using the standard deviation and not directly the variance is crucial. Indeed, if we take S​(x)=Var​(x)𝑆𝑥Var𝑥S(x)=\mathrm{Var}(x) in the hinge function, the gradient of S𝑆S with respect to x𝑥x becomes close to 0 when x𝑥x is close to x¯¯𝑥\bar{x}. In this case, the gradient of v𝑣v also becomes close to 0 and the embeddings collapse. We define the covariance matrix of Z𝑍Z as:
items.zh: γ 是标准差的常数目标值，在我们的实验中固定为 1，ε 是防止数值不稳定的一个小标量。该准则鼓励当前批次内的方差在每个维度上等于 γ，从而防止所有输入映射到同一向量时发生坍塌。使用标准差而不是直接使用方差至关重要。实际上，如果在 hinge 函数中取 S(x)=Var(x)，则当 x 接近 x̄ 时，S 对 x 的梯度接近于 0。在这种情况下，v 的梯度也接近于 0，嵌入向量发生坍塌。我们将 Z 的协方差矩阵定义为：

items.en: Inspired by Barlow Twins Zbontar et al. (2021), we can then define the covariance regularization term c𝑐c as the sum of the squared off-diagonal coefficients of C​(Z)𝐶𝑍C(Z), with a factor 1/d1𝑑1/d that scales the criterion as a function of the dimension:
items.zh: 受 Barlow Twins (Zbontar et al., 2021) 启发，我们可以将协方差正则化项 c 定义为 C(Z) 的平方非对角线系数之和，其中因子 1/d 根据维度缩放该准则：

items.en: This term encourages the off-diagonal coefficients of C​(Z)𝐶𝑍C(Z) to be close to 00, decorrelating the different dimensions of the embeddings and preventing them from encoding similar information. Decorrelation at the embedding level ultimately has a decorrelation effect at the representation level, which is a non trivial phenomenon that we study in Appendix D. We finally define the invariance criterion s𝑠s between Z𝑍Z and Z′superscript𝑍′Z^{\prime} as the mean-squared euclidean distance between each pair of vectors, without any normalization:
items.zh: 该项鼓励 C(Z) 的非对角线系数接近于 0，从而解耦嵌入向量的不同维度，防止它们编码相似的信息。嵌入层面的解耦最终会在表示层面产生解耦效果，这是一个非平凡的现象，我们在附录 D 中进行了研究。最后，我们将 Z 和 Z' 之间的不变性准则 s 定义为每对向量之间的均方欧氏距离，不进行任何归一化：

items.en: The overall loss function is a weighted average of the invariance, variance and covariance terms:
items.zh: 总损失函数是不变性项、方差项和协方差项的加权平均：

items.en: where λ𝜆\lambda, μ𝜇\mu and ν𝜈\nu are hyper-parameters controlling the importance of each term in the loss. In our experiments, we set ν=1𝜈1\nu=1 and perform a grid search on the values of λ𝜆\lambda and μ𝜇\mu with the base condition λ=μ>1𝜆𝜇1\lambda=\mu>1. The overall objective function taken on all images over an unlabelled dataset 𝒟𝒟\mathcal{D} is given by:
items.zh: 其中 λ、μ 和 ν 是控制损失中各项重要性的超参数。在我们的实验中，我们设置 ν=1，并在基本条件 λ=μ>1 下对 λ 和 μ 的值进行网格搜索。在未标注数据集 D 上对所有图像的整体目标函数由下式给出：

items.en: where ZIsuperscript𝑍𝐼Z^{I} and Z′⁣Isuperscript𝑍′𝐼Z^{\prime I} are the batches of embeddings corresponding to the batch of images I𝐼I transformed by t𝑡t and t′superscript𝑡′t^{\prime}. The objective is minimized for several epochs, over the encoder parameters θ𝜃\theta and expander parameters ϕitalic-ϕ\phi. We illustrate the architecture and loss function of VICReg in Figure 1.
items.zh: 其中 Z^I 和 Z'^I 是对应于图像批次 I 经过 t 和 t' 变换后的嵌入批次。该目标函数在多个 epoch 中针对编码器参数 θ 和扩展器参数 φ 进行最小化。我们在图 1 中展示了 VICReg 的架构和损失函数。

items.en: Implementation details for pretraining with VICReg on the 1000-classes ImagetNet dataset without labels are as follows. Coefficients λ𝜆\lambda and μ𝜇\mu are 252525 and ν𝜈\nu is 1 in Eq. (6), and ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon is 0.00010.00010.0001 in Eq. (1). We give more details on how we choose the coefficients of the loss function in Appendix D.4. The encoder network fθsubscript𝑓𝜃f_{\theta} is a standard ResNet-50 backbone He et al. (2016) with 2048 output units. The expander hϕsubscriptℎitalic-ϕh_{\phi} is composed of two fully-connected layers with batch normalization (BN) Ioffe & Szegedy (2015) and ReLU, and a third linear layer. The sizes of all 3 layers were set to 8192. As with Barlow Twins, performance improves when the size of the expander layers is larger than the dimension of the representation. The impact of the expander dimension on performance is studied in Appendix D. The training protocol follows those of BYOL and Barlow Twins: LARS optimizer You et al. (2017); Goyal et al. (2017) run for 1000 epochs with a weight decay of 10−6superscript10610^{-6} and a learning rate l​r=b​a​t​c​h​_​s​i​z​e/256×b​a​s​e​_​l​r𝑙𝑟𝑏𝑎𝑡𝑐ℎ_𝑠𝑖𝑧𝑒256𝑏𝑎𝑠𝑒_𝑙𝑟lr=batch\_size/256\times base\_lr, where b​a​t​c​h​_​s​i​z​e𝑏𝑎𝑡𝑐ℎ_𝑠𝑖𝑧𝑒batch\_size is set to 204820482048 by default and b​a​s​e​_​l​r𝑏𝑎𝑠𝑒_𝑙𝑟base\_lr is a base learning rate set to 0.20.20.2. The learning rate follows a cosine decay schedule Loshchilov & Hutter (2017), starting from 00 with 101010 warmup epochs and with final value of 0.0020.0020.002.
items.zh: 在无标签的 1000 类 ImageNet 数据集上使用 VICReg 进行预训练的详细实现如下：系数 λ 和 μ 为 25，ν 为 1（公式 (6)），ε 为 0.0001（公式 (1)）。关于如何选择损失函数系数的更多细节见附录 D.4。编码器网络 f_θ 是标准的 ResNet-50 主干网络 (He et al., 2016)，输出单元为 2048。扩展器 h_φ 由两个带有批归一化 (BN) (Ioffe & Szegedy, 2015) 和 ReLU 的全连接层以及第三个线性层组成。所有 3 层的尺寸均设置为 8192。与 Barlow Twins 一样，当扩展器层的尺寸大于表示维度时，性能会提升。扩展器维度对性能的影响在附录 D 中进行了研究。训练协议遵循 BYOL 和 Barlow Twins 的协议：LARS 优化器 (You et al., 2017; Goyal et al., 2017) 运行 1000 个 epoch，权重衰减为 10^{-6}，学习率 lr = batch_size/256 × base_lr，其中 batch_size 默认设置为 2048，base_lr 是基础学习率，设置为 0.2。学习率遵循余弦衰减调度 (Loshchilov & Hutter, 2017)，从 0 开始，有 10 个预热 epoch，最终值为 0.002。

items.en: In this section, we evaluate the representations obtained after self-supervised pretraining of a ResNet-50 He et al. (2016) backbone with VICReg during 1000 epochs, on the training set of ImageNet, using the training protocol described in section 4. We also pretrain on pairs of image and text data and evaluate on retrieval tasks on the MS-COCO dataset.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们评估了使用第 4 节描述的协议，在 ImageNet 训练集上使用 VICReg 对 ResNet-50 (He et al., 2016) 主干网络进行 1000 个 epoch 的自监督预训练后获得的表示。我们还对图像和文本数据对进行预训练，并在 MS-COCO 数据集上评估检索任务。

items.en: Following the ImageNet Deng et al. (2009) linear evaluation protocol, we train a linear classifier on top of the frozen representations of the ResNet-50 backbone pretrained with VICReg. We also evaluate the performance of the backbone when fine-tuned with a linear classifier on a subset of ImageNet’s training set using 1% or 10% of the labels, using the split of Chen et al. (2020a). We give implementation details about the optimization procedure for these tasks in Appendix C. We have applied the training procedure described in section 4 with three different random initialization. The numbers reported in Table 1 for VICReg are the mean scores, and we have observed that the difference between worse and best run is lower than 0.1% accuracy for linear classification, which shows that VICReg is a very stable algorithm. Lack of time has prevented us from doing the same for the semi-supervised classification experiments, and the experiments of section 5.2 and 6, but we expect similar conclusion to hold. We compare in Table 1 our results on both tasks against other methods on the validation set of ImageNet. The performance of VICReg is on par with the state of the art without using the negative pairs of SimCLR, the clusters of SwAV, the bag-of-words representations of OBoW, or any asymmetric networks architectural tricks such as the momentum encoder of BYOL and the stop-gradient operation of SimSiam. The performance is comparable to that of Barlow Twins, which shows that VICReg’s more explicit way of constraining the variance and comparing views has the same power than maximizing cross-correlations between pairs of twin dimensions. The main advantage of VICReg is the modularity of its objective function and the applicability to multi-modal setups.
items.zh: 遵循 ImageNet (Deng et al., 2009) 线性评估协议，我们在使用 VICReg 预训练的 ResNet-50 主干网络的冻结表示之上训练一个线性分类器。我们还评估了在使用 1% 或 10% 标签的 ImageNet 训练集子集上，使用线性分类器对主干网络进行微调后的性能，使用了 Chen et al. (2020a) 的划分。我们在附录 C 中给出了这些任务优化过程的实现细节。我们使用三种不同的随机初始化应用了第 4 节中描述的训练过程。表 1 中 VICReg 的报告数字是平均分数，我们观察到最差和最佳运行之间的差异低于 0.1% 的线性分类准确率，这表明 VICReg 是一个非常稳定的算法。由于时间限制，我们未能对半监督分类实验以及第 5.2 节和第 6 节的实验进行相同操作，但我们预计会得出类似的结论。我们在表 1 中将我们的结果与 ImageNet 验证集上的其他方法进行了比较。VICReg 的性能与最先进的方法相当，且无需使用 SimCLR 的负样本对、SwAV 的聚类、OBoW 的词袋表示，或任何非对称网络架构技巧，如 BYOL 的动量编码器和 SimSiam 的停止梯度操作。其性能与 Barlow Twins 相当，这表明 VICReg 更显式地约束方差和比较视图的方式与最大化孪生维度对之间的互相关具有相同的能力。VICReg 的主要优势在于其目标函数的模块化以及适用于多模态设置。

items.en: Following the setup from Misra & Maaten (2020), we train a linear classifier on top of the frozen representations learnt by our pretrained ResNet-50 backbone on a variety of different datasets: the Places205 Zhou et al. (2014) scene classification dataset, the VOC07 Everingham et al. (2010) multi-label image classification dataset and the iNaturalist2018 Horn et al. (2018) fine-grained image classification dataset. We then evaluate the quality of the representations by transferring to other vision tasks including VOC07+12 Everingham et al. (2010) object detection using Faster R-CNN Ren et al. (2015) with a R50-C4 backbone, and COCO Lin et al. (2014) instance segmentation using Mask-R-CNN He et al. (2017) with a R50-FPN backbone. We report the performance in Table 2, VICReg performs on par with most concurrent methods, and better than Barlow Twins, across all classification tasks, but is slightly behind the top-3 on detection tasks.
items.zh: 遵循 Misra & Maaten (2020) 的设置，我们在预训练的 ResNet-50 主干网络的冻结表示之上训练一个线性分类器，并在多个不同数据集上进行评估：Places205 (Zhou et al., 2014) 场景分类数据集、VOC07 (Everingham et al., 2010) 多标签图像分类数据集和 iNaturalist2018 (Horn et al., 2018) 细粒度图像分类数据集。然后，我们通过将表示迁移到其他视觉任务来评估其质量，包括使用 Faster R-CNN (Ren et al., 2015) 和 R50-C4 主干网络的 VOC07+12 (Everingham et al., 2010) 目标检测，以及使用 Mask R-CNN (He et al., 2017) 和 R50-FPN 主干网络的 COCO (Lin et al., 2014) 实例分割。我们在表 2 中报告了性能，VICReg 在所有分类任务上与大多数现有方法表现相当，且优于 Barlow Twins，但在检测任务上略逊于前三名。

items.en: One fundamental difference of VICReg compared to Barlow Twins is the way the branches are regularized. In VICReg, both branches are regularized independently, as the covariance term is applied on each branch separately, which works better in the scenarios where the branches are completely different, have different types of architecture and process different types of data. Indeed, the statistics of the output of the two branches can be very different, and the amount of regularization required for each may vary a lot. In Barlow Twins, the regularization is applied on the cross-correlation matrix, which favors the scenarios where the branches produce outputs with similar statistics. We demonstrate the capabilities of VICReg in a multi-modal experiment where we pretrain on pairs of images and corresponding captions on the MS-COCO dataset. We regularize each branch with a different coefficient, which is not possible with Barlow Twins, and we show that VICReg outperforms Barlow Twins on image and text retrieval downstream tasks. Table 3 reports the performance of VICReg against the contrastive loss proposed by VSE++ Faghri et al. (2018), and against Barlow Twins, in the identical setting proposed in Faghri et al. (2018). VICReg outperforms the two by a significant margin.
items.zh: VICReg 与 Barlow Twins 的一个根本区别在于分支正则化的方式。在 VICReg 中，两个分支独立进行正则化，因为协方差项分别应用于每个分支，这在分支完全不同、具有不同类型的架构并处理不同类型数据的场景中效果更好。实际上，两个分支输出的统计量可能非常不同，每个分支所需的正则化量也可能差异很大。在 Barlow Twins 中，正则化应用于互相关矩阵，这有利于分支产生具有相似统计量输出的场景。我们在多模态实验中展示了 VICReg 的能力，我们在 MS-COCO 数据集上对图像和对应标题对进行预训练。我们使用不同的系数正则化每个分支，这在 Barlow Twins 中是不可能的，并且我们表明 VICReg 在图像和文本检索下游任务上优于 Barlow Twins。表 3 报告了 VICReg 与 VSE++ (Faghri et al., 2018) 提出的对比损失以及 Barlow Twins 在 Faghri et al. (2018) 提出的相同设置下的性能。VICReg 以显著优势优于两者。

items.en: In this section we study how the different components of our method contribute to its performance, as well as how they interact with components from other self-supervised methods. We also evaluate different scenarios where the branches have different weights and architecture. All reported results are obtained on the linear evaluation protocol, using a ResNet-50 backbone if not mentioned otherwise, and 100 epochs of pretraining, which gives results consistent with those obtained with 1000 epochs of pretraining. The optimization setting used for each experiment is described in Appendix C.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们研究了我们方法的不同组成部分如何对其性能做出贡献，以及它们如何与其他自监督方法的组成部分相互作用。我们还评估了分支具有不同权重和架构的不同场景。所有报告的结果均在线性评估协议上获得，除非另有说明，使用 ResNet-50 主干网络，预训练 100 个 epoch，这与 1000 个 epoch 预训练的结果一致。每个实验使用的优化设置见附录 C。

items.en: Asymmetric networks. We study the impact of different components used in asymmetric architectures and the effects of adding variance and covariance regularization, in terms of performance and training stability. Starting from a simple symmetric architecture with an encoder and an expander without batch normalization, which correspond to VICReg without batch normalization in the expander, we progressively add batch normalization in the inner layers of the expander, a predictor, a stop-gradient operation and a momentum encoder. We use the training protocol and architecture of SimSiam Chen & He (2020) when a stop-gradient is used and the training protocol and architecture of BYOL Grill et al. (2020) when a momentum encoder is used. The predictor as used in SimSiam and BYOL is a learnable module gψsubscript𝑔𝜓g_{\psi} that predicts the embedding of a view given the embedding of the other view of the same image. If z𝑧z and z′superscript𝑧′z^{\prime} are the embeddings of two views of an image, then p=gψ​(z)𝑝subscript𝑔𝜓𝑧p=g_{\psi}(z) and p′=gψ​(z′)superscript𝑝′subscript𝑔𝜓superscript𝑧′p^{\prime}=g_{\psi}(z^{\prime}) are the predictions of each view. The invariance loss function of Eq. (5) is now computed between a batch of embeddings Z=[z1,…,zn]𝑍subscript𝑧1…subscript𝑧𝑛Z=[z_{1},\dots,z_{n}] and the corresponding batch of predictions P=[p1′,…,pn′]𝑃superscriptsubscript𝑝1′…superscriptsubscript𝑝𝑛′P=[p_{1}^{\prime},\dots,p_{n}^{\prime}], then symmetrized:
items.zh: 非对称网络。我们研究了非对称架构中使用的不同组件的影响，以及添加方差和协方差正则化在性能和训练稳定性方面的效果。从一个简单的对称架构开始，该架构包含一个编码器和一个没有批归一化的扩展器，这对应于扩展器中没有批归一化的 VICReg，我们逐步添加扩展器内部层的批归一化、预测器、停止梯度操作和动量编码器。当使用停止梯度时，我们使用 SimSiam (Chen & He, 2020) 的训练协议和架构；当使用动量编码器时，我们使用 BYOL (Grill et al., 2020) 的训练协议和架构。SimSiam 和 BYOL 中使用的预测器是一个可学习模块 g_ψ，它根据同一图像的一个视图的嵌入预测另一个视图的嵌入。如果 z 和 z' 是图像两个视图的嵌入，则 p = g_ψ(z) 和 p' = g_ψ(z') 是每个视图的预测。公式 (5) 中的不变性损失函数现在在嵌入批次 Z=[z_1,...,z_n] 和相应的预测批次 P=[p'_1,...,p'_n] 之间计算，然后对称化：

items.en: where D𝐷D is a distance function that depends on the method used. BYOL uses the mean square error between l2subscript𝑙2l_{2}-normalized vectors, SimSiam uses the negative cosine similarity loss and VICReg uses the mean square error without l2subscript𝑙2l_{2}-normalization. The variance and covariance terms are regularizing the output Z𝑍Z and Z′superscript𝑍′Z^{\prime} of the expander, which we empirically found to work better than regularizing the output of the predictor. We compare different settings in Table 4, based on the default data augmentation, optimization and architecture settings of the original BYOL, SimSiam and VICReg methods. In all settings, the absence of BN indicates that BN is also removed in the predictor when one is used.
items.zh: 其中 D 是依赖于所用方法的距离函数。BYOL 使用 l2 归一化向量之间的均方误差，SimSiam 使用负余弦相似度损失，VICReg 使用不带 l2 归一化的均方误差。方差和协方差项正则化扩展器的输出 Z 和 Z'，我们凭经验发现这比正则化预测器的输出效果更好。我们在表 4 中比较了不同设置，基于原始 BYOL、SimSiam 和 VICReg 方法的默认数据增强、优化和架构设置。在所有设置中，缺少 BN 表示在使用预测器时也移除了 BN。

items.en: We analyse first the impact of variance regularization (VR) in the different settings. When using VR, adding a predictor (PR) to VICReg does not lead to a significant change of the performance, which indicates that PR is redundant with VR. In comparison, without VR, the representations collapse, and both stop-gradient (SG) and PR are necessary. Batch normalization in the inner layers of the expander (BN) in VICReg leads to a 1.0% increase in the performance, which is not a big improvement considering that SG and PR without BN is performing very poorly at 35.1%.
items.zh: 我们首先分析方差正则化 (VR) 在不同设置中的影响。使用 VR 时，向 VICReg 添加预测器 (PR) 不会导致性能显著变化，这表明 PR 与 VR 是冗余的。相比之下，没有 VR 时，表示会坍塌，并且停止梯度 (SG) 和 PR 都是必需的。扩展器内部层的批归一化 (BN) 在 VICReg 中使性能提高了 1.0%，考虑到没有 BN 的 SG 和 PR 性能非常差（35.1%），这算是一个不错的改进。

items.en: Finally, incorporating VR with SG or ME further improves the performance by small margins of respectively 0.2% and 0.9%, which might be explained by the fact that these architectural tricks that prevent collapse are not perfectly maintaining the variance of the representations, i.e. very slow collapse is happening with these methods. We explain this intuition by studying the evolution of the standard deviation of the representations during pretraining for BYOL and SimSiam in Appendix D. We then analyse the impact of adding additional covariance regularization (CR) in the different settings, along with variance regularization. We found that optimization with SG and CR is hard, even if our analysis of the average correlation coefficient of the representations during pretraining in Appendix D shows that both fulfill the same objective.
items.zh: 最后，将 VR 与 SG 或 ME 结合使用，性能分别小幅提高了 0.2% 和 0.9%，这可能是因为这些防止坍塌的架构技巧并不能完美地维持表示的方差，即这些方法正在发生非常缓慢的坍塌。我们通过在附录 D 中研究 BYOL 和 SimSiam 在预训练期间表示标准差的演变来解释这一直觉。然后，我们分析了在不同设置中添加额外协方差正则化 (CR) 以及方差正则化的影响。我们发现使用 SG 和 CR 进行优化很困难，尽管我们在附录 D 中对预训练期间表示的平均相关系数的分析表明两者实现了相同的目标。

items.en: The performance of BYOL and SimSiam slightly drops compared to VR only, except when PR is removed, where SG becomes useless. BN is still useful and improves the performance by 1.3%. Finally with CR, PR does not harm the performance and even improves it by a very small margin. VICReg+PR with 1000 epochs of pretraining exactly matches the score of VICReg (73.2% on linear classification).
items.zh: 与仅使用 VR 相比，BYOL 和 SimSiam 的性能略有下降，除非移除 PR，此时 SG 变得无用。BN 仍然有用，并将性能提高了 1.3%。最后，使用 CR 时，PR 不会损害性能，甚至以很小的幅度提高了性能。使用 1000 个 epoch 预训练的 VICReg+PR 与 VICReg 的分数完全匹配（线性分类 73.2%）。

items.en: Weight sharing. Contrary to most self-supervised learning approaches based on Siamese architectures, VICReg has several unique properties: (1) weights do not need to be shared between the branches, each branch’s weights are updated independently of the other branch’s weights; (2) the branches are regularized independently, the variance and covariance terms are computed on each branch individually; (3) no predictor is necessary unlike with methods where one branch predicts outputs of the other branch. We compare the robustness of VICReg against other methods in different scenarios where the weights of the branches can be shared (SW), not shared (DW), and where the encoders can have different architectures (DA). Among other self-supervised methods, SimCLR and Barlow Twins are the only ones that can handle these scenarios. The asymmetric methods that are based on a discrepancy between the branches requires either the architecture or the weights to be shared between the branches. The performance drops by 2.1% with VICReg and 4.5% with Barlow Twins, between the shared weights scenario (SW) and the different weight scenario (DW). The difference between VICReg and Barlow Twins is also significant in scenarios with different architectures, in particular VICReg performs better than Barlow Twins by 2.8% with ResNet-50/ResNet-101 and better by 2.3% with ResNet-50/ViT-S Dosovitskiy et al. (2021). This shows that VICReg is more robust than Barlow Twins in these kind of scenarios. The performance of SimCLR remains stable across scenarios, but is significantly worse than the performance of VICReg. Importantly, the ability of VICReg to function with different parameters, architectures, and input modalities for the branches widens the applicability to joint-embedding SSL to many applications, including multi-modal signals.
items.zh: 权重共享。与大多数基于孪生架构的自监督学习方法相反，VICReg 具有几个独特的性质：(1) 分支之间不需要共享权重，每个分支的权重独立于另一个分支的权重进行更新；(2) 分支独立进行正则化，方差和协方差项在每个分支上单独计算；(3) 不需要预测器，这与一个分支预测另一个分支输出的方法不同。我们比较了 VICReg 与其他方法在分支权重可以共享 (SW)、不共享 (DW) 以及编码器可以具有不同架构 (DA) 的不同场景中的鲁棒性。在其他自监督方法中，SimCLR 和 Barlow Twins 是唯一能够处理这些场景的方法。基于分支之间差异的非对称方法要求分支之间共享架构或权重。在共享权重场景 (SW) 和不同权重场景 (DW) 之间，VICReg 的性能下降了 2.1%，Barlow Twins 下降了 4.5%。VICReg 和 Barlow Twins 之间的差异在不同架构场景中也很显著，特别是在 ResNet-50/ResNet-101 中 VICReg 比 Barlow Twins 好 2.8%，在 ResNet-50/ViT-S (Dosovitskiy et al., 2021) 中好 2.3%。这表明 VICReg 在这类场景中比 Barlow Twins 更鲁棒。SimCLR 的性能在不同场景中保持稳定，但明显低于 VICReg 的性能。重要的是，VICReg 能够处理分支的不同参数、架构和输入模态，这拓宽了联合嵌入自监督学习在许多应用中的适用性，包括多模态信号。

items.en: We introduced VICReg, a simple approach to self-supervised learning based on a triple objective: learning invariance to different views with a invariance term, avoiding collapse of the representations with a variance preservation term, and maximizing the information content of the representation with a covariance regularization term. VICReg achieves results on par with the state of the art on many downstream tasks, but is not subject to the same limitations as most other methods, particularly because it does not require the embedding branches to be identical or even similar.
items.zh: 我们介绍了 VICReg，一种简单的自监督学习方法，基于三重目标：通过不变性项学习对不同视图的不变性，通过方差保持项避免表示坍塌，以及通过协方差正则化项最大化表示的信息内容。VICReg 在许多下游任务上取得了与最先进方法相当的结果，但不受大多数其他方法相同限制的约束，特别是因为它不需要嵌入分支相同甚至相似。
